raw_input.title: Senior ERP Consultant @MYTHERESA (f/m/d)
raw_input.job_html_or_text: Senior ERP Consultant in Munich. In-house MS Dynamics Business Central consulting, finance module expertise, workshops, stakeholder requirements, ERP team collaboration, German language required.

profile.base_cv_text: Backend Python/Django/FastAPI/PostgreSQL engineer in Malaga. No German language, Munich relocation, ERP consulting, finance module, or MS Dynamics Business Central background.

human_review_notes: Reviewed real case: ERP consulting plus German/Munich gap should not be treated as a strong software fit.
